experiment_name.description: The name of the experiment (eg Yuliya-vida-finetune).

run_id.description: The run ID of the experiment (eg 2024-06-17_15-30-00).

scene_id.description: The ID of the scene (eg scene_001).

noise.description: The noise score for the image from -2 to 2.

sharpness.description: The sharpness score for the image from -2 to 2.

details.description: The details score for the image from -2 to 2.

dynamic_range.description: The dynamic range score for the image from -2 to 2.

exposure.description: The exposure score for the image from -2 to 2.

contrast.description: The contrast score for the image from -2 to 2.

banding.description: The banding score for the image from -2 to 2.

white_balance.description: The white balance score for the image from -2 to 2.

saturation.description: The saturation score for the image from -2 to 2.

ghosting.description: The ghosting score for the image from -2 to 2.
